ChangeRequest.name: Change the codes within the Time past due band Domain
ChangeRequest.comment:
<!-- See: documentation on [Issues in GitLab](https://gitlab.sofa.dev/sdd-bird-team/bird-logical-data-model/-/wikis/Issues-in-GitLab) -->
### Overview The codes of the below allowed values of the Domain "Time past due band" are not aligned with the ROL: - "> 180 days <= 1 year (16)" - "> 90 days <= 180 days (12)"
It should be: - "> 180 days <= 1 year (**17**)" - "> 90 days <= 180 days (**13**)"
### Contact person @Maria_Manuel.Henriques
### Description of change request Change the code of the below allowed values: - "> 180 days <= 1 year (**17**)" - "> 90 days <= 180 days (**13**)"
### Summary of impacted LDM objects/attributes Domain: Time past due band
### Forward Engineering considerations _[Other considerations]_
### Before closing checklist - [ ] Assignee for review - [ ] Assignee to close - [ ] Any other actions to be taken
